canonical_definition: The Abstract Causal REasoning dataset, a diagnostic benchmark designed to evaluate a model's ability to perform causal induction by identifying which "Blicket" objects trigger a machine.
papers: Look, Remember and Reason: Grounded Reasoning in Videos with Language Models
Phenomenal Yet Puzzling: Testing Inductive Reasoning Capabilities of Language Models with Hypothesis Refinement
